current_run.problem_name: Hidden Ternary Majority of Products with Offset
current_run.description: Given a function f(x) that computes the ternary majority of three specific bit pairs from x, plus a secret offset, find the secret offset. The function is f(x) = (majority(x[i], x[j], x[k]) + s) mod 3. The indices i, j, k and the offset s are secret.
